title: More Sigma Than Ever
description:
This Is More Sigma Than My Forge Dashboard!

- Contains 70 Things On A Mod!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ef717ba26f0d2f4aed0508ec90ad235b07fca71.png)

Welcome to The World Where Crazy things happens, 24 Hours Till Realease


**Version 1.0.4**
- Release!
- Added Extendo Fork!
- Added Pink Stairs
- Added The Void Dimesion ( Worthless ofc...)
- Added Pink Slabs
- Added Pink Door
- Added A potion Effect!
- Added More Achivements
- Added a Message On Joining World
- More Craftables!
- Added Pink Gates
- Added a Pink Button
- Changed the name from the creative tab ( Because it Sucked )


( This dosent mean i wont update the mod anymore i will add more things )
  

**Version 1.0.3**
- Close To Realease!
- Added back to Ashes2ashes with out any triggers
- Added phase 2 of SigmaPashini
- Added More Advancements!
- Added an Enchanting 
- Added a new Biome

 **Version 1.0.2** ( Tiny Update ):

- Now You Can Obtain Sigma In a Jar By Killing A SigmaPashini
- Craft The New Shield!
- Now Added A Message For Reporting Bugs

**Version: 1.0.1:**
- Completely Removed Ashes2ashes Mob ( Due To Such Errors)
- New Mob Caseoh ( Remplaicing Ashes2ashes )
- New Dimension ( Sigma World )
- Added More Items
- Added The Pink Obsidian
- Added 2 Paintings
- Added More Advancements and Recepies


**Version 1.0.0 ( Beta ):**
- Added SigmaPashini
- Added Ashes2ashes
- Added 2 Weapons
- Added Sigma Bricks
- Added Bricked

**Recepies:**
